extortion.description: Oscars Group is a prominent hospitality collective in New South Wales, founded in 1986 by the Gravanis brothers. The group manages an extensive portfolio of over 35 venues, including pubs, hotels, accommodation, and events centers, catering to a diverse clientele. Their offerings span various segments such as gaming, retail liquor, and residential developments. With a focus on creativity and entertainment, Oscars Group aims to deliver exceptional experiences to guests across its venues.company is headquartered in Level 6, Bayside Tower, 376 Bay Street, Brighton-Le-Sands NSW 2216, Australia.<25 Employees
